zh.lifeSummary: 當Mark Greene於1560年出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，他的父親John Greene24歲，母親Agnes Moulton25歲。他和Jane Fitch至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1616年11月25日在英國米德萊可哈可尼享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可哈可尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mark Greene于1560年出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，他的父亲John Greene24岁，母亲Agnes Moulton25岁。他和Jane Fitch至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1616年11月25日在英国米德萊可哈可尼享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可哈可尼。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Mark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Marcus , borne by the Evangelist, author of the second gospel in the New Testament, and by several other early and medieval saints. In Arthurian legend, King Mark is the aged ruler of Cornwall to whom Isolde is brought as a bride by Tristan; his name was presumably of Celtic origin, perhaps derived from the element march ‘horse’. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages but was in more frequent use by the end of the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mark Greene was born in 1560, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, his father, John Greene, was 24 and his mother, Agnes Moulton, was 25. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Jane Fitch. He died on 25 November 1616, in Hackney, Middlesex, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Hackney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mark Greene est né en 1560, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Greene, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Moulton, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Jane Fitch. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1616, à Hackney, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Hackney, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mark Greene 1560 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Greene 24 und seine Mutter Agnes Moulton 25. Er hatte mit Jane Fitch mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. November 1616 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Hackney, Middlesex, England und wurde in Hackney, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mark Greene è nato il nel 1560 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Greene, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Moulton, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Jane Fitch. Morì il 25 novembre 1616, nel Hackney, Middlesex, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Hackney, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Mark Greene(이)가 1560년 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Greene(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Moulton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Jane Fitch(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1616년 11월 25일 영국 미들레세스 해c니에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 해c니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mark Greene nasceu em 1560, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Greene, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Moulton, tinha 25 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mark Greene родился в 1560 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Greene было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Moulton, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Jane Fitch. Он умер 25 ноября 1616 г. в местности хаккни, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности хаккни, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mark Greene nació en 1560, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Greene, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Agnes Moulton, tenía 25 años.
